title: KitchenPerfected 3.5Ltr Oval Slow Cooker - 3 Heat Settings - Removable Crock Pot - Power & Temp Indicator Light - Toughened Glass Lid - Cool Touch Handles - Brushed Steel - E3036SS
features: 3 HEAT SETTINGS: Choose between high, low and warm settings. The low setting provides convenient cooking when left unattended for long periods of time. Perfect for minimum fuss meals such as curries, broths, soups and stews!
REMOVEABLE CERAMIC CROCK POT: This makes for easy cleaning, as you can remove the inner pot once it has cooled for cleaning.
TOUGHENED GLASS LID: The lid with stainless steel rim works great with high heat and aids with the cooking process by keeping the heat in.
COOL TOUCH HANDLES: There are handles on either side of the unit, attached away from the ceramic cooking pot, meaning you are able to move the cooker whilst it is switched on.
POWER/TEMPERATURE INDICATOR: The lights on the front of the cooker will let you know that it is powered on, and when it is at cooking temperatue.
description: The KitchenPerfected 3.5Ltr Oval Slow Cooker is perfect for lots of different dishes. Select from low, high and warm heat settings to create dishes such as curries, broths and soups with minimum fuss. Featuring a sleek brushed steel look and toughened glass lid with stainless steel rim to aid the cooking process. Cool touch handles located on either side of the cooker allow you to move it around your kitchen when it is in use. The power and temperature indicator let you know that the cooker is powered on, and also when it has reached cooking temperature. When you are finished using the slow cooker, you can easily remove the inner ceramic crock pot once it has cooled down. This makes for easier cleaning. Box Includes: KitchenPerfected 3.5Ltr Oval Slow Cooker - Brushed Steel Instruction Manual
